# Generated by ollama (codellama)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup
Resources:
  SQSQueue:
    Type: 'AWS::SQS::Queue'
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 86400 # seconds, which is equal to one day
      VisibilityTimeout: 300 # seconds, which is equal to five minutes
  SNSTopic:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Topic'
  QueuePolicy:
    Type: 'AWS::IAM::Policy'
    Properties:
      PolicyName: 'MyQueuePolicy'
      PolicyDocument:
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Action:
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
              - sns:Publish
              - sns:Subscribe
              - sns:ListTopics
            Resource: !Join [ '', [ 'arn:aws:sqs:', { Ref: 'AWS::Region' }, ':', { Ref: 'AWS::AccountId' }, ':my-queue' ] ]
  SNSSubscription:
    Type: 'AWS::SNS::Subscription'
    Properties:
      TopicArn: !Ref SNSTopic
      Protocol: 'sqs'
      Endpoint: !Join [ '', [ 'arn:aws:sqs:', { Ref: 'AWS::Region' }, ':', { Ref: 'AWS::AccountId' }, ':my-queue' ] ]
